g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does analytics.py read from the JSONL log files?')
sendPrompt('How should the bot leaderboard view be calculated? What stats per bot?')
sendPrompt('How should the LLM ranking be aggregated across all personalities?')
sendPrompt('How should personality win rates be aggregated across all LLMs?')
sendPrompt('How is win rate calculated for a poker bot?')
sendPrompt('What is net chip delta and why is it a better metric than win rate?')
sendPrompt('What does aggression factor mean in poker statistics?')
sendPrompt('What does fold rate tell us about a poker bots strategy?')
sendPrompt('How would we measure consistency across personalities for a given LLM?')
sendPrompt('What does chip trend over time tell us about an LLM player?')
sendPrompt('Which personalities tend to fold more, and why might that be?')
sendPrompt('How would we visualise draw behaviour across different personality types?')
